text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text: I need every piece, every key.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Client info... Alibis... Eyewitness testimony... The
answer to the howdunit could only be—

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Hahahaha! Of course! It's so clear! Quod
erat demonstrandum!

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text: The case of the missing carrot hamburger steak is solved... Hah, that was a little too elementary to be of satisfaction though.
